name: Patient Case
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I can't work, I am not valuable.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never recover and return to work.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of work-related situations and people.
situation: Running into a coworker outside the workplace while on medical leave.
auto_thought: They must think I'm faking or not really sick.
behavior: Avoiding eye contact and trying to end the interaction quickly.
